chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-2007 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders on office objections. 22.10.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Zangejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that the compromise has been reached between the parties. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
